missables: Red Armlet — Destruction Sphere chest, Kilika Temple. Cannot return to Kilika Temple after leaving — this is permanently missable.

subLocations.name: Kilika Port
subLocations.prose: The port is in ruins after Sin's attack. Follow the party west to find Yuna performing the Sending. The next morning, before leaving: rescue the crying girl from the rubble west of the docks to trigger a small scene, and find Al Bhed Primer Vol. IV just west of the inn. The merchant woman near the south chest sells arms and armor — worth checking if any of your party members need upgrades. Rest at the inn when ready.

subLocations.name: Kilika Woods
subLocations.prose: Take the west side path past Lord Ochu's position to find Wakka's Scout weapon in a chest — you can skip the boss entirely. Lord Ochu is optional and hits hard at this stage (weak to Fire — have Lulu go in with Cheer stacked), but Luzzu hands you an Elixir if you pull it off. Use Kimahri's Lancet on the Ragora here to learn Seed Cannon. The Luck Sphere is at the north end of the central path before you turn east toward the temple stairs.

items.name: Elixir (from Luzzu after Lord Ochu — optional)

subLocations.name: Kilika Temple
subLocations.prose: Work through the fire-sphere puzzle to reach the deep chamber. Before leaving via the exit door, obtain the Destruction Sphere from the secret chamber on the top platform and use it in the slot beneath the ledge to reveal the Red Armlet chest. This is permanently missable — unlike Besaid, you cannot return to Kilika Temple at any point in the game.

bosses.strategy: Optional fight in Kilika Woods (4,649 HP / Overkill 800) — skip if underleveled; the reward is an Elixir from Luzzu and a NulBlaze Shield from the Crusaders sentry (only awarded if Ochu is already dead when you speak to him). Lord Ochu's main threats are Poison and heavy physicals — cure Poison immediately with Antidotes or Yuna's Esuna. Spam Lulu's Fire spells (its weakness); cast Haste on Lulu if Tidus has learned it to accelerate damage output. Below 2,000 HP, Lord Ochu switches to Earthquake — summon Valefor at this point, as Valefor is completely immune to Earthquake. Lord Ochu also falls asleep periodically to begin regenerating HP; wake him immediately with normal physical attacks (not spells) the moment Z's appear above his head, then finish the fight quickly.

Phase 1 (shell form, 3,000 HP / Overkill 900): The shell absorbs magic — do NOT cast spells on the body. The tentacles (450 HP / Overkill 500 each) also absorb magic. Destroy both tentacles first using physical attacks; once they are gone, use Kimahri's Lancet (piercing physical) to chip away at the shell body — only Kimahri's piercing weapon can damage it in this phase. Phase 2 (shell destroyed, body exposed): Geneaux is now vulnerable to everything — use Lulu's Fire spells (weakness) and physicals freely. Throughout the fight, watch for Geneaux's Venom attack which can poison the whole party; use Antidotes or Yuna's Esuna to clear it immediately. Keep Yuna in reserve for healing.
